notes: Machine-readable twin of docs/fleet-release.md. TEMPLATE: populated=false means versions are not yet pinned to a validated release. While unpopulated, smart-onboard installs the latest add-ons and SKIPS OS/Core/add-on version pinning (it warns instead of failing) so the tool still runs end-to-end on a bring-up unit. Fill in the versions from `ha os info` / `ha core info` / `ha addons` on the bring-up Pi, set populated=true, and tag the release id. The future Jetson AI-node contract (JetPack version, container image digests, model versions) will get its own section here when that phase lands.
